_note: REAL evaluation results (not mock). Generated by judy.eval.compare_variants. UI components can fetch('/benchmark_results.json').
task: Pairwise QA judging — pick the answer humans preferred

variants.label: V0 — Baseline (vanilla)
variants.description: Minimal generic prompt: 'which answer is better overall?' No rubric, no bias guards. This is the standard LLM-as-a-judge baseline.

variants.label: V1 — Structured rubric (improved)
variants.description: Engineered policy: derive criteria from the task, judge correctness independently of fluency, with explicit bias guards (fluency != correctness, length != quality, position-invariance).
